hooks.command: bash -c 'FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- "*.tsx" "*.ts" | head -50); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then FOUND=$(echo "$FILES" | xargs grep -l "blue-[0-9]\|red-[0-9]\|green-[0-9]\|console\.log\|console\.debug" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "Anti-patterns found in:"; echo "$FOUND"; echo "Fix these before committing."; exit 1; fi; fi; echo "No anti-patterns found"; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILES=$(git diff --cached --name-only -- "*.tsx" "*.ts" | head -50); if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then FOUND=$(echo "$FILES" | xargs grep -ln "TODO\|FIXME\|HACK\|XXX" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "Unresolved markers found in:"; echo "$FOUND"; echo "Resolve these before committing."; exit 1; fi; fi; echo "No unresolved markers found"; exit 0'

bash -c 'if command -v npx &>/dev/null && [ -f tsconfig.json ]; then npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | tail -20; exit ${PIPESTATUS[0]}; else echo "TypeScript check skipped (no tsconfig.json)"; exit 0; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then FOUND=$(grep -n "blue-[0-9]\|red-[0-9]\|green-[0-9]\|yellow-[0-9]\|gray-[0-9]\|slate-[0-9]" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "Hardcoded Tailwind colors detected in $FILE:"; echo "$FOUND"; echo "Use CSS variables instead: var(--color-*)"; exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_file_path"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then EMPTY=$(grep -n "catch\s*([^)]*)[\s]*{[\s]*}" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$EMPTY" ]; then echo "Empty catch blocks detected in $FILE:"; echo "$EMPTY"; echo "Add error handling or at least log the error."; exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0'
